verses.text: Priests must not eat holy things while unclean. Clean. The holy is handled with reverence.
Priests must not eat holy things while unclean. Clean. The holy is handled with reverence.
Priests must not eat holy things while unclean. Clean. The holy is handled with reverence.
One unclean by issue or touch is unclean till evening. Defiled. Uncleanness bars from holy food.
One unclean by issue or touch is unclean till evening. Defiled. Uncleanness bars from holy food.
One unclean by issue or touch is unclean till evening. Defiled. Uncleanness bars from holy food.
When the sun sets and he washes, he may eat. Cleansed. Cleansing restores his portion.
When the sun sets and he washes, he may eat. Cleansed. Cleansing restores his portion.
When the sun sets and he washes, he may eat. Cleansed. Cleansing restores his portion.
No stranger eats holy things, but the priest's household may. The household. Provision is for the priest's house.
No stranger eats holy things, but the priest's household may. The household. Provision is for the priest's house.
No stranger eats holy things, but the priest's household may. The household. Provision is for the priest's house.
No stranger eats holy things, but the priest's household may. The household. Provision is for the priest's house.
He that eats it unwittingly restores it with a fifth added. Restitution. Even mistakes are made good.
He that eats it unwittingly restores it with a fifth added. Restitution. Even mistakes are made good.
He that eats it unwittingly restores it with a fifth added. Restitution. Even mistakes are made good.
Offerings must be without blemish to be accepted. Without blemish. God will not be served with the maimed.
Offerings must be without blemish to be accepted. Without blemish. God will not be served with the maimed.
Offerings must be without blemish to be accepted. Without blemish. God will not be served with the maimed.
Offerings must be without blemish to be accepted. Without blemish. God will not be served with the maimed.
A blemished beast is not accepted, even from a stranger. Whole. The best is given to God.
A blemished beast is not accepted, even from a stranger. Whole. The best is given to God.

A blemished beast is not accepted, even from a stranger. Whole. The best is given to God.
A young beast stays seven days; offer not it and its dam in one day. Compassion. Even sacrifice has its mercies.

Keep His commandments; 'I am the LORD which hallow you.' Hallowed. God sanctifies His people.
